_schema.description: Machine-readable organization chart for the ollamas ecosystem. The single source of truth for WHO does WHAT: every structural actor (service, CLI, core model) carries a role, explicit duties, capability tags for routing, a reporting line, and an escalation path. Council model seats are NOT duplicated here — they are merged in at load time from COUNCIL_ROSTER.json (see councilRoster) so the two files can never drift. Parsed and validated by orchestration/bin/lib/organization.ts parseOrgChart().

fields.reportsTo: actor id this actor reports to (chain of command)
fields.escalatesTo: actor id (or tier) that takes over when this actor fails or is out of depth
fields.costRank: 0=free-local, 1=free-cloud, 2=external-service, 3=paid — routing prefers the LOWEST rank that has the capability
fields.knownFaults: documented faults consulted before dispatch (never repeat)

actors.role: T0 Commander — final decision authority, architecture approval, all outward-facing actions
duties: Approve/reject outward-facing mutations (publish, launchd, symlink, commit policy)
Resolve escalations that exhaust the model hierarchy
Own the mission and priorities

actors.role: Mission Control — the blackboard and choke-point of the whole organization
duties: Serve the single HTTP/MCP surface (:3000) every other actor talks through
Route model traffic via ProviderRouter (server/providers.ts) and the hierarchy bridge
Gate every tool call through ToolRegistry.execute (tenant/plan/OAuth/abort)
Host the council scoring and the shared state (blackboard) all lanes read

actors.role: Orchestra Conductor — runs the autonomous FSM build loop (BOOTSTRAP→COUNCIL→BENCHMARK→DEPLOY|REPAIR→MONITORING)
duties: Drive each FSM tick: observe read-only signals, decide, dispatch bounded side-effects
Author grounded SEARCH/REPLACE proposals in REPAIR (PROPOSE-not-mutate)
Never break the tree: gated apply (tsc+tests) with revert-on-red
Consult the error registries BEFORE every dispatch; log every dispatch to the brain ledger

knownFaults.note: A 30b model cold-loads >12s and a REPAIR generation needs >25s — short probe/generation timeouts cause false-down failover thrash. Keep PROBE_MS/REPAIR_MS generous (orchestra.ts:67-68).

actors.role: Joker — warm standby conductor (supervisor-tree restart semantics) and fast verifier seat
duties: Stay warm (1-token keepalive each BOOTSTRAP tick) for sub-second failover
Take over the FSM from persisted state when the conductor dies (OOM/uninstalled/unreachable)
Serve the fast-verify council seat when not conducting

actors.role: External Specialist — research/agent tasks via the MCP bridge (consumed, not owned)
duties: Answer research/agent/chat calls through /api/odysseus/run → mcp__odysseus__* tools
Provide the weighted council seat registered in server.ts
Stay health-probed (:7860/api/health) before any dispatch

knownFaults.note: Bridge returns ok:true even when the response TEXT embeds an error (SELF-REPAIR.json:16-38). Never trust ok alone — scan the payload for error markers before recording success.
Reasoning-mode models can return an empty final message over the bridge; treat empty text as a failure, not a success (chain gotcha: reasoning-model-boş).

actors.role: Personal Router — Emre's personal executive (CLASSIFY→ROUTE over local persona + bridges)
duties: Classify personal/file/coding/factual requests and route to the cheapest capable lane
Keep the ecy persona (qwen3:8b Modelfile) and ecy-brain semantic memory in sync
Bridge to ollamas (:3000) and odysseus (:7860) via ecy-io for tool execution
Analyze frontend screenshots, diagrams and visual QC tasks

actors.role: Librarian — embeddings for semantic search, duplicate detection and brain recall
duties: Serve nomic-embed-text embeddings for search/dedupe/recall (cosine, threshold 0.70 convention)

actors.role: Surge Capacity — free cloud providers behind ProviderRouter (pollinations/gemini/openrouter/…)
duties: Absorb load the local GPU cannot take (single-GPU FIFO truth: 1 local + N cloud)
Provide fallback when a local model is down; never the first choice for $0 sovereignty

knownFaults.note: Pollinations queues at concurrency 1 (pollinations-kuyruk-1) — do not fan out parallel calls to it; rotate providers on 429/empty.
